description: Low-signal funding hints should still produce a structured watchlist candidate with a cautious follow-up path.

candidates.title: Regional food hub planning workshop with emerging grant hints
candidates.summary: A planning workshop mentions future support for cooperative food hubs, but the funding path is not fully specified yet.
candidates.rationale: The source is light on hard funding detail, yet it points to a relevant convening where a future cooperative grant or partnership signal may emerge.
candidates.recommendedNextStep: Keep it in the watchlist and revisit after the workshop agenda or sponsor details are posted.
